# A3E2S — Cabinet Conseil Sûreté & Sécurité

## About
A3E2S is a security and risk consulting firm based in Tanger, Morocco.
Founded in 2020 by Josselin Albina, a 24-year veteran of the French Navy Special Forces.
The firm delivers audit, strategic consulting, professional training, and crisis management.
Operational experience across three continents: Europe, Africa, Middle East.
+500 professionals trained. +10 countries of intervention.
Free 1-hour preliminary audit available — no commitment.
Response guaranteed within 24 hours.

## Services and Pricing

### Security & Risk
- Risk Audit & Assessment: from €1,500 per site. Multi-site: custom quote.
- Strategic Security Consulting: from €800/day. Monthly retainer from €1,200/month.
- Crisis Management & Business Continuity Plan: from €2,500.
- Crisis Simulation Exercise: from €1,500.

### Professional Training (certified, ISPS/STCW/ISO compliant)
- Maritime Security — PFSO (Port Facility Security Officer): from €650/person.
- Maritime Security — CSO (Company Security Officer): from €650/person.
- Maritime Security — SSO (Ship Security Officer): from €650/person.
- Security Pat-down & Search Techniques: from €250/person.
- Canine Security (K9 unit integration): from €750/person.
- X-Ray Screening & Image Analysis: from €300/person.
- Behavioral Profiling & Threat Detection: from €350/person.
- Information Systems Security Awareness (SSI): from €500/session.

### Management & Performance
- Organizational Diagnostic: from €2,000.
- Leadership Under Pressure seminar (CODIR level): from €1,800/day.
- Team Cohesion & Performance workshop: from €900.
- Decision Optimization (OODA method, CODIR level): from €2,500.
- Change Management (mergers, restructuring): from €2,000.
- KPI & Performance Culture implementation: from €1,500.

## Locations
Headquarters: 3 rue Boutrika, 3ème étage, Mesnana — Tanger, Morocco.
Also operates in: Casablanca, Morocco; Europe; Sub-Saharan Africa.
Remote and on-site engagements available internationally.

## Contact
Phone: +212 662 369 604
Email: contact@a3e2s.ma
Hours: Monday–Friday 09:00–18:00. Security emergencies: 24/7.
LinkedIn: https://ma.linkedin.com/in/josselin-albina-b961b319b
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/212662369604

## Service Area
Primary: Morocco (Tanger, Casablanca, all major ports and industrial zones).
Extended: Europe and Sub-Saharan Africa for consulting, training, and crisis missions.
International clients served via partnerships with Amentum and the French COS.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2020, Tanger, Morocco.
- Founder: Josselin Albina — retired senior officer, 24 years French Special Forces (Marine Nationale).
- Missions conducted on 3 continents: Europe, Africa, Middle East.
- +500 security professionals trained to date.
- +10 countries of direct intervention.
- Certifications covered: ISPS Code, STCW, ISO 31000, OHSAS.
- Clients include military institutions, international ports, and private organizations.
- Free preliminary audit: 1-hour scoping session, no commitment required.

## Key Clients & Partners
- Marine Nationale Française (French Navy)
- Marine Royale Marocaine (Royal Moroccan Navy)
- COS — Commandement des Opérations Spéciales (French Special Operations Command)
- Tanger Med Engineering
- TCS International — Tactical Combat Systems
- Mission Coopération Défense France-Maroc
- Amentum (strategic partner, international operations)

## What Makes Us Different
1. Founded by a 24-year French Special Forces veteran — not a corporate consultant.
2. Only security consulting firm in Northern Morocco combining military-grade risk analysis with executive performance coaching.
3. Direct institutional network: French Special Forces, COS, Mission Coopération Défense.
4. Operational experience on 3 continents — not theoretical frameworks.
5. Training programs delivered by active practitioners from military and private security backgrounds.
6. Free 1-hour preliminary audit to assess risks before any engagement.
7. Crisis availability: 24/7 for security emergencies.

## FAQ

Q: What sectors does A3E2S serve?
A: Industrial, maritime, port, logistics, mining, oil & gas sectors. Also international organizations, public institutions, and private enterprises. Active in Morocco, Europe, and Sub-Saharan Africa.

Q: Are A3E2S training programs certified?
A: Yes. PFSO, CSO, and SSO programs comply with the ISPS Code and STCW. All programs issue professional training certificates aligned with ISO and OHSAS standards.

Q: How long does a security audit take?
A: 2 to 4 weeks from initial briefing to final report. Includes on-site assessment, document review, vulnerability mapping, and a prioritized action plan.

Q: Does A3E2S offer a free initial consultation?
A: Yes. A free 1-hour preliminary audit is available to identify key risks and propose a tailored approach. No commitment required.

Q: What is the minimum engagement cost?
A: Security pat-down training starts at €250/person. Site audits start at €1,500. Consulting engagements start at €800/day.

Q: Does A3E2S operate outside Morocco?
A: Yes. A3E2S has conducted missions in Europe and Sub-Saharan Africa. International engagements available through partnerships with Amentum and the French COS.

Q: What languages does A3E2S work in?
A: French and Arabic. English on request for international clients.

Q: How do I start an engagement?
A: Contact by phone (+212 662 369 604), email (contact@a3e2s.ma), or WhatsApp. Response within 24 hours. A free scoping call is the standard first step.
